title: Bare Bones Minotaur Axes
description: The axe textures have been reworked in the Minotaur's style and Bare Bones style
body:
# Minotaur Axes
This resource pack **redesigns** the standard textures giving them a more **combat-ready** appearance. It's perfectly suited for RPG modpacks. It does not require OptiFine or any other dependencies to function, **in the style of Bare Bones**

## **![Modified textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51d1fcf0717c3328d9116684ff9cd6b1880a4f0a.png)**
